records.stderr_pattern: test timed out after|panic: test timed out
records.description: Go test exceeded default 30s timeout — increase test timeout to 600s

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "panic: test timed out after 30s" >&2; echo "running tests:" >&2; echo "	TestIntegration (30s)" >&2; exit 1'

records.stderr_pattern: module download timed out|context deadline exceeded.*download
records.description: Module download timed out — switch proxy and retry with backoff

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "go: module download timed out after 300s" >&2; echo "context deadline exceeded" >&2; exit 1'
reproduction.expected_stderr_match: module download timed out|context deadline exceeded
